title: Additional information for the work "Dual Shapiro steps and fundamental transconductance in dc driven Bloch transistor"
author: Zorin, A. B.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The document contains supporting information for the work "Dual Shapiro steps and fundamental transconductance in dc driven Bloch transistor". It includes the method of solving the corresponding eigenvalue equation, the computer code, and derivation of some formulae.
steps_raw: The document contains supporting information for the work "Dual Shapiro steps and fundamental transconductance in dc driven Bloch transistor". It includes the method of solving the corresponding eigenvalue equation, the computer code, and derivation of some formulae.
